description:
You are a localization engineer who has just received the latest English master-translation file.  
Two INI files already exist:

1. /home/user/project/translations/app_en.ini   – the up-to-date English source  
2. /home/user/project/translations/app_es.ini   – the Spanish file that is missing some keys

Your job is to:

A) Scan app_en.ini and detect every key that is **present in the English file but absent from the Spanish file** (section by section).

B) For every missing key:
   • Append the key to the correct section inside /home/user/project/translations/app_es.ini  
   • Use the English text as a temporary placeholder preceded by the literal string “TODO: ” (without the quotes).  
     Example placeholder: `exit=TODO: Exit`

C) Produce a log file at /home/user/translation_update.log summarizing exactly what you added.

Log-file requirements (strictly enforced by the automated checker):
• Name: /home/user/translation_update.log  
• One line per key added, **alphabetically sorted by the key name**.  
• Line format (no spaces):  
  <key>|<section>|<english_value>  
  For example:  
  `exit|General|Exit`

No extra spaces, headers, or blank lines are allowed in the log file.

When you are finished:
• /home/user/project/translations/app_es.ini must contain all keys found in /home/user/project/translations/app_en.ini.  
• Every new Spanish entry must follow the “TODO: ” placeholder rule.  
• /home/user/translation_update.log must exist and follow the exact format described above.

You only need a few shell commands plus a text editor or scripting language of your choice to accomplish this.
truth:
Initial file system state:

1. Directory: /home/user/project/translations  (already exists and is writable by the user)

2. /home/user/project/translations/app_en.ini  (exact contents, including blank lines)
------------------------------------------------
[General]
welcome=Welcome
exit=Exit

[Errors]
file_not_found=File not found
permission_denied=Permission denied
------------------------------------------------

3. /home/user/project/translations/app_es.ini  (exact contents)
------------------------------------------------
[General]
welcome=Bienvenido

[Errors]
file_not_found=Archivo no encontrado
------------------------------------------------

Desired final state after the agent completes the task:

1. /home/user/project/translations/app_es.ini
------------------------------------------------
[General]
welcome=Bienvenido
exit=TODO: Exit

[Errors]
file_not_found=Archivo no encontrado
permission_denied=TODO: Permission denied
------------------------------------------------
(The order of sections must remain as shown. Keys inside each section may appear in any order **within that section** as long as they are under the correct header.)

2. /home/user/translation_update.log
------------------------------------------------
exit|General|Exit
permission_denied|Errors|Permission denied
------------------------------------------------
(The two lines must appear in this alphabetical order.)

No additional files or directories should be created.
